name: hermes-agent
description: An AI agent with advanced tool-calling capabilities, featuring a flexible toolsets system for organizing and managing tools.

scripts.postinstall: echo '✅ Browser tools ready. Run: python run_agent.py --help'
scripts.desktop:check: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/desktop && npm run test:desktop:portable-mode --workspace apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:package:portable:win: npm run desktop:check && npm run verify:install-source --workspace apps/desktop && cross-env HERMES_REQUIRE_CLEAN_BUILD=1 npm run dist:win:portable --workspace apps/desktop && npm run test:desktop:portable:win --workspace apps/desktop
